name: Italian Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Low Sodium Canned Tomatoes, Chopped, Undrained
1/2 cup Dry White Wine or Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into 1/2-inch cubes and set aside.
2. Sauté onions and garlic in oil until tender.
3. Add tomato sauce, chopped tomatoes, liquid, and all seasonings except parsley to a pot.
4. Let simmer for 20–30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the fish and cook until done, about 10 minutes.
6. Stir in parsley before serving.
7. This dish serves seven people as 1-cup portions.
8. You can prepare the base ahead of time and add your favorite seafood when ready to serve.
9. Substitutions: Chopped squid, minced clams, or scallops work well.
Note: Vegetable oil is used for sautéing; no aggressive cooking methods are required.
